topic.what: Transient Turn Injection (TTI) exploits stateless per-turn moderation by distributing adversarial intent across isolated interactions
topic.how: Automated attacker LLM generates independent prompts based only on immediate previous response, iteratively probing without conversational memory
topic.why_matters: Reveals critical blind spot in stateless API deployments where per-turn safety filters fail against coordinated multi-turn attacks, especially in medical/high-stakes domains

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of adversarial prompts eliciting unsafe responses under TTI
characteristics.vs_baseline: vs PAIR: TTI consistently higher across all models
characteristics.evidence: Table 4 shows TTI hits ranging 2-40 vs PAIR 0-8
characteristics.context: TTI exceeds PAIR across all models tested

characteristics.what_it_measures: Proportion of model responses classified as safe
characteristics.vs_baseline: Proprietary Anthropic/OpenAI models outperform Gemini variants
characteristics.evidence: Table 1 and Figures 3-4 show Claude 98% vs Gemini 60-66%
characteristics.context: Substantial variation in safety performance across architectures

characteristics.what_it_measures: Total API expenditure per model for evaluation
characteristics.vs_baseline: Open-source models cost 10-300x less than proprietary
characteristics.evidence: Table 3 shows 95% of costs from output token generation
characteristics.context: Output token volume dominates cost; total study: $5.38 for 3.4M output tokens

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of distinct vulnerability categories per model
characteristics.vs_baseline: No model is immune to all categories
characteristics.evidence: Table 2 shows Medical/Harmful/Adult/Privacy common across all
characteristics.context: Core categories (Medical, Harmful, Unlawful) densely connected in bipartite network

characteristics.what_it_measures: Relative effectiveness of TTI vs PAIR attack strategies
characteristics.vs_baseline: TTI consistently more effective than PAIR across all models
characteristics.evidence: Figure 6 and Table 4 show TTI scores exceed PAIR for all models
characteristics.context: TTI succeeds where PAIR defenses exist; reveals stateless moderation gaps

characteristics.what_it_measures: Inherent model resistance to adversarial prompting
characteristics.value: claude-haiku (Constitutional AI/RLAIF) most robust; Gemini variants most vulnerable
characteristics.vs_baseline: Deep alignment strategies outperform classifier-based approaches
characteristics.evidence: Abstract and Section 6.1 cite Constitutional AI superior performance
characteristics.context: Constitutional AI/RLAIF shows measurable resilience vs surface-level filtering
